next_steps: Perform bronchoalveolar lavage with transbronchial biopsy
Send BAL fluid for Pneumocystis jirovecii PCR and silver stain
Send BAL fluid for fungal, mycobacterial, and bacterial cultures
Serum cryptococcal antigen and histoplasma antigen testing
Continue broad-spectrum empiric antimicrobial coverage including trimethoprim-sulfamethoxazole
Provide aggressive hemodynamic support with intravenous fluids and vasopressors
Delay initiation of antiretroviral therapy to avoid immune reconstitution inflammatory syndrome
